who: logistics accountants processing 10–20 fuel purchase receipts/month
offer: For logistics accountants processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We streamline reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of fuel receipts with mileage logs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics accountants
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics accountants with demo video
Community forums where logistics accountants share tools
try_it: Let users manually enter fuel receipts and mileage logs for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
